parameters.jsCode:
const sources = [
  { country: "🇺🇸 USA", name: "New York Times", url: "https://rss.nytimes.com/services/xml/rss/nyt/World.xml" },
  { country: "🇺🇸 USA", name: "Washington Post", url: "https://feeds.washingtonpost.com/rss/world" },
  { country: "🇷🇺 Russland", name: "TASS", url: "https://tass.com/rss/v2.xml" },
  { country: "🇷🇺 Russland", name: "RT", url: "https://www.rt.com/rss/news/" },
  { country: "🇺🇦 Ukraine", name: "Ukrinform", url: "https://www.ukrinform.net/rss/block-lastnews" },
  { country: "🇺🇦 Ukraine", name: "Kyiv Post", url: "https://www.kyivpost.com/rss" },
  { country: "🇮🇷 Iran", name: "IRNA", url: "https://en.irna.ir/rss" },
  { country: "🇮🇷 Iran", name: "Press TV", url: "https://www.presstv.ir/RSS" },
  { country: "🇮🇶 Irak", name: "Rudaw", url: "https://www.rudaw.net/english/rss" },
  { country: "🇮🇶 Irak", name: "Iraqi News", url: "https://www.iraqinews.com/feed/" },
  { country: "🇹🇷 Türkei", name: "Anadolu Agency", url: "https://www.aa.com.tr/en/rss/default?cat=general" },
  { country: "🇨🇳 China", name: "Xinhua", url: "http://www.xinhuanet.com/english/rss/worldnews.xml" },
  { country: "🇨🇳 China", name: "CGTN", url: "https://www.cgtn.com/subscribe/rss/section/world.do" },
  { country: "🇩🇪 Deutschland", name: "Tagesschau", url: "https://www.tagesschau.de/xml/rss2/" },
  { country: "🇫🇷 Frankreich", name: "Le Monde", url: "https://www.lemonde.fr/rss/une.xml" },
  { country: "🇮🇹 Italien", name: "ANSA", url: "https://www.ansa.it/english/news/general_news/index_rss.shtml" },
  { country: "🇪🇸 Spanien", name: "El País", url: "https://feeds.elpais.com/mrss-s/pages/ep/site/english.elpais.com/portada" },
  { country: "🇵🇱 Polen", name: "PAP", url: "https://www.pap.pl/aktualnosci/rss.xml" },
  { country: "🇭🇺 Ungarn", name: "Index.hu", url: "https://index.hu/24ora/rss/" },
  { country: "🇳🇱 Niederlande", name: "NOS", url: "https://feeds.nos.nl/nosnieuwsalgemeen" },
  { country: "🇦🇹 Österreich", name: "ORF", url: "https://rss.orf.at/news.xml" },
  { country: "🇨🇿 Tschechien", name: "iROZHLAS", url: "https://www.irozhlas.cz/rss/irozhlas/section/zpravy-domov" },
  { country: "🇬🇷 Griechenland", name: "Ekathimerini", url: "https://www.ekathimerini.com/rss/" },
  { country: "🇸🇪 Schweden", name: "SVT", url: "https://www.svt.se/nyheter/rss.xml" },
  { country: "🇧🇪 Belgien", name: "RTBF", url: "https://www.rtbf.be/info/rss" },
  { country: "🇷🇴 Rumänien", name: "Digi24", url: "https://www.digi24.ro/rss" },
  { country: "🇫🇮 Finnland", name: "YLE", url: "https://feeds.yle.fi/uutiset/v1/majorHeadlines/YLE_UUTISET.rss" },
  { country: "🇵🇹 Portugal", name: "Público", url: "https://www.publico.pt/api/rss" }
];
return sources.map(s => ({ json: s }));

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }], max_tokens: 350, temperature: 0.3 }) }}
